items.original_text: under appreciated that codex is open source Ahmed: Lots of people get surprised when I tell them that Codex is open source
items.zh_text: 人们低估了 Codex 是开源的事实。Ahmed：当我告诉很多人 Codex 是开源的时候，他们都很惊讶。

items.original_text: RT Dovydas Vitkauskas 🇺🇸🇪🇺 A new study from the US-based New England Journal of Medicine found that Americans die earlier across all income levels compared to their European counterparts. What’s especially notable is that America’s one percenters are getting outlived by Europe’s poorest. US’s overall average life expectancy is 79, while EU’s is 82. At the same time, US is spending much more (18% of GDP) than EU (10%) on healthcare. What’s the main reason for the European advantage over US in the key parameter of public health, such as longevity: A) Better diet; B) Universal healthcare; C) Cheaper and less drugs prescribed; D) More preventive rather than reactive healthcare; E) Other?
items.zh_text: 转发 Dovydas Vitkauskas 🇺🇸🇪🇺 美国《新英格兰医学杂志》的一项新研究发现，在所有收入水平上，美国人的死亡年龄都比欧洲人更早。尤其值得注意的是，美国最富有的1%人群的寿命甚至低于欧洲最贫困的人群。美国总体平均预期寿命为79岁，而欧盟为82岁。与此同时，美国在医疗保健上的支出（占GDP的18%）远高于欧盟（10%）。在长寿等公共卫生关键指标上，欧洲相对于美国的主要优势是什么：A) 更好的饮食；B) 全民医疗；C) 更便宜且处方更少的药物；D) 更多预防性而非反应性医疗；E) 其他？

items.original_text: RT Parmita Mishra This is the dumbest thing I’ve ever seen in my life

items.original_text: “Make matters of competence trivial.” Montagnard: AI does not need to be agentic to transform civilization completely; it just needs to be able to make matters of competence trivial.
items.zh_text: “让能力问题变得微不足道。”蒙塔格纳德：人工智能无需具备自主性就能彻底改变文明；它只需要能够让能力问题变得微不足道。

items.original_text: RT Montagnard AI does not need to be agentic to transform civilization completely; it just needs to be able to make matters of competence trivial. Big Jelly Ape: The ones fearmongering about AI are the lowest agency people. They behave in a way most similar to ChatGPT.
items.zh_text: RT Montagnard AI 不需要具备自主性就能彻底改变文明；它只需要能让能力问题变得微不足道。Big Jelly Ape：那些对 AI 危言耸听的人是自主性最低的人。他们的行为方式与 ChatGPT 最为相似。

items.original_text: Interesting. Rishabh Mukherjee: I can share an interesting experience from last week. We have a person who is incharge of buying hardware, software and data sets. This might sound stupid but when you are buying 100s of servers, workstations and laptops a month, it's complicated. This dude used Claude to create
items.zh_text: 有趣。Rishabh Mukherjee：我可以分享上周的一个有趣经历。我们有一个负责采购硬件、软件和数据集的人。这听起来可能有点蠢，但当你每个月要采购数百台服务器、工作站和笔记本电脑时，事情就变得复杂了。这家伙用了Claude来创建

items.original_text: June is going to be an insane month - Gemini 3.5 Pro - GPT 5.6 and 5.6 Pro - Sonnet 4.7 - Mythos (maybe?) - Kimi or GLM next versions My current bet is on Google coming back, as long as they have reasonable prices
items.zh_text: 六月将会是一个疯狂的月份——Gemini 3.5 Pro、GPT 5.6 和 5.6 Pro、Sonnet 4.7、Mythos（也许？）、Kimi 或 GLM 的下一版本。我目前押注谷歌会回归，只要他们定价合理。

items.original_text: Google can still come back with 3.5 Pro, if they don’t increase prices A cheaper Opus class model will make a significant dent
items.zh_text: 如果谷歌不提高价格，他们仍然可以用 3.5 Pro 扳回一局。一款更便宜的 Opus 级别模型将产生重大影响。

items.original_text: The Flash Model That Rocks - DeepSeek Flash - It's dirt cheap. Almost 100x cheaper - works very well for small tasks - great for operating on large amounts of data/records

items.original_text: We’re expanding our partnership with Singapore to help safely deploy AI at scale. 🇸🇬 Together with country experts, our new programs will focus on accelerating scientific discovery, advancing pandemic preparedness, and improving healthcare. Find out more → https://goo.gle/49jGwjv

items.original_text: RT Google Gemini Gemini Omni is here, and we’ve been seeing amazing creations all week. Here are some standouts 👇
items.zh_text: 转推 Google Gemini：Gemini Omni 来了，我们这周看到了许多令人惊叹的创作。以下是一些亮点 👇

items.original_text: RT Varun Mohan Thanks for all of the Antigravity feedback over the last couple of days, especially around the IDE. Our intention was never to remove the IDE support for developers, and we should have been clearer with that in the product from the beginning. We’ve made it clearer in 2.0 on how to connect to the IDE, fixed issues with opening the IDE on Windows machines, provided instructions to restore IDE settings & extensions, and more. New releases for the Antigravity IDE and Antigravity 2.0 have rolled out with these changes. We should have done better so we’re going to reset everyone’s Gemini quota for the week again.
items.zh_text: 转推 Varun Mohan：感谢大家过去几天对 Antigravity 的所有反馈，尤其是关于 IDE 的部分。我们的初衷绝不是取消对开发者的 IDE 支持，从一开始我们就应该在产品中更清晰地说明这一点。我们在 2.0 版本中明确了如何连接到 IDE，修复了在 Windows 机器上打开 IDE 的问题，提供了恢复 IDE 设置和扩展的说明，以及其他改进。包含这些变更的 Antigravity IDE 和 Antigravity 2.0 新版本已发布。我们本可以做得更好，因此我们将再次重置大家本周的 Gemini 配额。

items.original_text: RT Lucas Beyer (bl16) Can't believe we're getting this before GTA 6 CHRIS FIRST: I uploaded a screenshot of Google Maps to Gemini Omni with a route drawn on it. Then I prompted it to create a first person view of someone driving a taxi cab along the route in the reference image. Pretty close to the real thing.
items.zh_text: 转发 Lucas Beyer (bl16) 真不敢相信我们在《GTA 6》之前就得到了这个。CHRIS FIRST：我把一张谷歌地图的截图上传到了 Gemini Omni，上面画了一条路线。然后我提示它创建一个第一人称视角，模拟有人驾驶出租车沿着参考图像中的路线行驶。结果相当接近真实情况。

items.original_text: RT Logan Kilpatrick Gemini 3.5 Flash has made huge progress from 3.1 Pro on GDPval, Flash is competing at the frontier, post training going strong :)
items.zh_text: 转发 Logan Kilpatrick：Gemini 3.5 Flash 在 GDPval 上相比 3.1 Pro 取得了巨大进步，Flash 正在前沿领域竞争，后训练进展强劲 :)

items.original_text: new codex ships today! OpenAI Developers: It’s Codex Thursday, and yes, we have updates for you. First up: Appshots, a new way to bring the context of what you’re working on into Codex. On your Mac, press Command-Command to attach your app window to a Codex thread. Codex gets both a screenshot and text from the window,
items.zh_text: 新的 Codex 今天发布！OpenAI 开发者们：今天是 Codex 星期四，没错，我们为你们带来了更新。首先是：Appshots，一种将你正在处理的内容上下文带入 Codex 的新方式。在你的 Mac 上，按 Command-Command 键将你的应用窗口附加到 Codex 线程中。Codex 会从窗口中获取截图和文本。

items.original_text: the attack at the mosque in san diego is one of the most chilling i have seen. my deepest condolences to the victims, families, and community.
items.zh_text: 圣地亚哥清真寺发生的袭击是我见过最令人不寒而栗的事件之一。我向受害者、家属和社区致以最深切的哀悼。

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出 OpenAI 保证容量：一项新服务，使客户能够保证长期访问 OpenAI 的计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投资，以帮助客户可靠地扩展。现在，保证容量帮助客户在计算资源受限的世界中提前规划关键工作负载。http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity

items.original_text: RT Sam Altman if this tweet gets 1 like, tibo will reset codex rate limits
items.zh_text: 转发 Sam Altman 的推文：如果这条推文获得 1 个赞，tibo 将重置 codex 的速率限制。

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

items.original_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
items.zh_text: 个人动态：我已加入Anthropic。我认为未来几年在大语言模型前沿领域将尤其具有塑造性。我非常兴奋能加入这里的团队并重返研发工作。我依然对教育充满热情，并计划适时恢复我在该领域的工作。

items.original_text: Over the past few months, we've been holding dialogues with scholars, philosophers, clergy, and ethicists on the questions AI raises—starting with how good character forms. Read more about how we’re widening the conversation on frontier AI: https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai
items.zh_text: 过去几个月里，我们一直在与学者、哲学家、神职人员和伦理学家就人工智能引发的问题进行对话——首先从良好品格如何形成开始。了解更多关于我们如何拓宽前沿人工智能对话的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai

items.original_text: RT Tulsee Doshi (1/4) Gemini 3.5 Flash is in a league of it's own! ⚡️ It's the perfect combo of intelligence, speed, & cost. It's now my daily driver in both Spark & Antigravity! Watch 3.5 spawn subagents organize a set of marketing assets, rename them, and put them into folders
items.zh_text: 转推 Tulsee Doshi (1/4) Gemini 3.5 Flash 独树一帜！⚡️ 它完美结合了智能、速度与成本效益。现在它是我在 Spark 和 Antigravity 中的日常主力模型！观看 3.5 生成子代理整理一组营销素材、重命名并放入文件夹。

items.original_text: Anthropic is acquiring @stainlessapi, an SDK and MCP server platform that has powered every Anthropic SDK since the earliest days of our API. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless
items.zh_text: Anthropic 正在收购 @stainlessapi，这是一个 SDK 和 MCP 服务器平台，自我们 API 早期以来，一直为每个 Anthropic SDK 提供支持。了解更多：https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-acquires-stainless

items.original_text: We've published a paper that explains our views on AI competition between the US and China. The US and democratic allies hold the lead in frontier AI today. Read more on what it’ll take to keep that lead: https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership
items.zh_text: 我们发表了一篇论文，阐述了对中美AI竞争的看法。美国及其民主盟友目前在尖端AI领域保持领先。了解更多关于如何保持这一领先地位的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的新型多模型自主安全系统整合了超过100个专业代理，涵盖前沿模型和定制模型，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶级性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用该系统帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册在私人预览中测试该系统。

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法真的很管用：在提问结束时，让你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式输出结果。更广泛地说，我认为音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，但视觉（图像/动画/视频）是偏好的输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的十车道高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然有底层代码的程序化方式，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为这种外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于如何将精确/程序化的“软件 1.0”产物（例如交互式模拟）与神经产物（扩散网格）编织在一起，还有许多悬而未决的问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。在输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频是不够的，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势屏幕上的内容，就像你与一个真人一起站在电脑屏幕旁时所做的所有事情一样。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有大量工作要做，并且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳入 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。在当前阶段值得探索的是，一个小窍门：尝试要求输出 HTML。Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今看到它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一词元预测……全都在单元格中实现，令人欣慰。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: RT Jeff Hollan Here's another reason why @Microsoft Foundry is the BEST platform in the world to build and run your agents: Our durable, long running agents come with Toolbox 🔨 Toolbox allowed me to reduce input tokens 90%(!!) and significantly simplify the amount of code needed Check out the demo below and see how you can bring hundreds of tools through a single MCP endpoint -- all running in Foundry at cloud scale! ☁️
items.zh_text: 转 Jeff Hollan：@Microsoft Foundry 是全球构建和运行智能体的最佳平台，还有一个原因：我们的持久化、长时间运行的智能体配备了工具箱 🔨 工具箱让我将输入令牌减少了 90%（！！），并显著简化了所需代码量。查看下面的演示，了解如何通过单个 MCP 端点引入数百个工具——全部在 Foundry 中以云规模运行！☁️

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
